title: August 17
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 17''' is the 229th day of the year (230th in leap years). There are 136 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Jonathan W. Rinzler]] is born.
*[[1960s#1968|1968]] – [[Orlagh Cassidy]] is born.
*[[1970]] – [[Rupert Degas]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Rae Carson]] is born.
*[[1982]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 65|''Star Wars'' (1977) 65]] released.
*1982 – [[Star Wars Annual (1977) 2|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 2]] published.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 9|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 9]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 113|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 113]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Bryton James]] is born.
*[[2006]] – [[Star Wars: The Official Magazine 65|''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 65]] published.
*[[2011]] – [[Knight Errant: Deluge 1|''Knight Errant: Deluge'' 1]] published.
*2011 – [[Star Wars Insider 127|''Star Wars Insider'' 127]] published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Miniatures Game]]'' released.
*[[2016]] – [[Poe Dameron 5|''Poe Dameron'' 5]] published.
*[[2018]] – The first trailer for ''[[Star Wars Resistance]]'' is uploaded on the [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney]] YouTube Channel.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Original Marvel Years Vol. 5]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Naval Weapons and Equipment]]'' published in [[Wikipedia:Spanish language|Spanish]].
*2021 – "[[Star Wars Inside Intel: The Death Star|''Star Wars'' Inside Intel: The Death Star]]" published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2022]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 26|''Star Wars'' (2020) 26]] published.
*2022 – [[The Mandalorian 2|''The Mandalorian'' 2]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Terence Stamp]] dies.
